name: Gipsy House Grape Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the washed bunches of grapes into the pan and just cover with water, holding the fruit down with your hand.
2. Simmer gently until they are soft, about 20 minutes.
3. Strain off the juice using a nylon muslin bag.
4. Measure the liquid: for every 1 pint, allow 1 pound sugar.
5. Return the juice to the pan, bring to a boil, add the sugar and boil until the setting point is reached.
6. Ladle into jars, allow to cool and wax seal.
7. This jelly can be flavored with a small piece of cinnamon or a clove added to each pot.
